first_name.description: The first name of the pet owner.

last_name.description: The last name of the pet owner.

email.description: The email address of the pet owner, used for communication.

phone_number.description: The primary phone number of the pet owner.

address.description: The physical address of the pet owner.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the owner record was created.

species.description: The species of the pet (e.g., Dog, Cat, Bird).

date_of_birth.description: The birth date of the pet.

owner_id.description: Reference to the owner of this pet.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the patient record was created.

patient_id.description: Reference to the patient (pet) for this appointment.

owner_id.description: Reference to the owner associated with this appointment.

appointment_date.description: The date and time of the appointment.

reason.description: The reason for the appointment (e.g., check-up, vaccination, emergency).

status.description: The current status of the appointment.

notes.description: Any additional notes or observations for the appointment.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the appointment record was created.
